rulings.Case Title: SAN DONG BEST INC. ET AL VS. GENERAL TSO KITCHEN, INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 19, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT DAVID TSAO DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with final leave to amend for plaintiff to allege in good faith facts in support of each element of each cause of action, including existence of an enforceable contract and its breach; and violation of CC 1950.8.=(501/CFH)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 19, 2019 line 5. rulings.Case Title: KIM KLAUSNER VS. AIMEE TSAO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 19, 2019 line 6. DEFENDANT AIMEE TSAO, LORIN TSAO DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint states a cause of action for unlawful detainer. Plaintiff complained with notice requirements under the Ellis Act and SFRO. The hearing will be at 1:30 p.m. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: BARBARA SIMON VS. DAVID E. COMER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 19, 2019 line 7. DEFENDANT DAVID COMER DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges facts to support a cause of action for unlawful detainer. =(501/CFH)
